mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_difficulty_stats (category, label_key, correct_count, incorrect_count, updated_at) VALUES (#{category}, #{labelKey}, #{correctDelta}, #{incorrectDelta}, now()) ON CONFLICT (category, label_key) DO UPDATE SET correct_count = item_difficulty_stats.correct_count + EXCLUDED.correct_count, incorrect_count = item_difficulty_stats.incorrect_count + EXCLUDED.incorrect_count, updated_at = now()
